title: corybas taiwanensis
intro: Corybas taiwanensis, also known as the Taiwanese corybas, is a species of orchid native to Taiwan. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to cool the body and relieve fever. The health benefits of Corybas taiwanensis include its antipyretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating conditions such as high blood pressure and arthritis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in decoctions or infusions, and its dried rhizomes are sometimes used to make tea, with the leaves and flowers used separately in different formulas.
